pi_items.source: Web search confirmed IFR Low is one of the available chart types in Avare aviation GPS app: https://www.faa.gov/air_traffic/flight_info/aeronav/productcatalog/ifrcharts/lowaltitude/

Web search confirmed Sectional is the default chart type in Avare. Documentation from apps4av.com and GitHub repository indicate 'Sectionals are the default chart presentation in Avare' (https://apps4av.com/faa-charts-reference.html)

privileged_info_summary: Avare is a real open-source Android aviation GPS application supporting multiple FAA chart types. The task requires changing the chart display from the default Sectional chart to IFR Low enroute chart. Both the target_chart ('IFR Low') and default_chart ('Sectional') metadata values are accurate chart types that exist in the Avare application.
